_schema: News. Fields: id (live-site slug), title (verbatim), dek (verbatim subtitle/byline where the live site shows one), lab_ids[] -> labs.json ([] + org_wide for whole-Generator stories), themes[] (Innovation | Critical Inquiry | Ethics & Policy | Hands-On | Research), url (live babson.edu URL), video (bool). Array order = live-site display order (newest first). Dates are not published on the live index and are deliberately NOT invented here. summary: 1-2 sentence prototype summary written from harvested babson.edu source copy (July 2026) — flagged as such in the UI. published: ESTIMATED dates (the live site publishes none) — date_estimated flags them; UI shows ~ and a footnote. source/audiences: derived for the prototype table. author: byline when known, else the website.

news.title: Over 50% of Babson's Faculty Have Been Peer-trained in AI Concepts and AI Tools
news.dek: The Generator leads Babson's AI Teaching Training Program (AITTP)
news.summary: More than half of Babson's faculty have completed peer-led training in AI concepts and tools through the AI Teaching Training Program (AITTP), which The Generator runs — one of the highest AI-training rates among business schools.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The 6 Disciplines Companies Need to Get the Most Out of Gen AI
news.summary: Tom Davenport outlines six disciplines — spanning strategy, data, and workforce readiness — that companies need in place to capture real value from generative AI.
news.author: Tom Davenport

news.title: Meaningful Writing in the Age of Generative Artificial Intelligence
news.dek: By Kristi Girdharry and Davit Khachatryan
news.summary: Kristi Girdharry and Davit Khachatryan on preserving meaningful student writing when generative AI can draft anything — published in Double Helix.
news.author: Kristi Girdharry & Davit Khachatryan

news.title: Entrepreneurship Education at the Dawn of Generative Artificial Intelligence
news.summary: Erik Noyes on how generative AI reshapes what and how we teach entrepreneurs, in Entrepreneurship Education & Pedagogy.
news.author: Erik Noyes

news.title: AI in Entrepreneurship Education: An Interdisciplinary Approach
news.dek: Babson's Generator reimagines entrepreneurship education in the AI-age
news.summary: How The Generator's eight-lab, interdisciplinary model reimagines entrepreneurship education for the AI age.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The Generator-Microsoft Entrepreneurship & AI Buildathon
news.dek: 220+ students, 12 universities, 40+ teams — winners Terraflex built an AI-powered adaptive prosthetic
news.summary: The Generator–Microsoft Buildathons drew 200+ and then 220+ students from up to twelve universities. Winners Terraflex built an AI-powered adaptive prosthetic that took the $2,500 first prize and the $60,000 Nature-Inspired Design Prize.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: Babson College Integrates AI into Wide Range of Studies
news.dek: WCVB's David Bienick visits The Generator to see how students integrate AI into coursework
news.summary: WCVB's David Bienick visits the Weissman Foundry to see how Babson students use AI across coursework — from ideation to venture pitches.
news.author: David Bienick, WCVB

news.title: The Generator Hosts “AI Entrepreneurship & Innovation” Event
news.summary: Recap of The Generator's “AI Entrepreneurship & Innovation” event connecting founders, faculty, and students.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The Generator Releases its First Survey of Babson Faculty AI-Usage
news.summary: The Generator's first survey of Babson faculty AI usage — baseline data on adoption, use cases, and concerns across the college.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The Generator Hosts “Creative Options to Leverage AI in Your Teaching”
news.summary: A hands-on faculty session on creative ways to bring AI into course design and classroom activities.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The Generator and Babson's AI Club Co-sponsor “How I Use AI”
news.summary: Co-sponsored with Babson's AI Club: students and faculty share the AI workflows they actually use.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The Generator Invited to Microsoft Headquarters to Present on AI & Education
news.summary: The Generator presented its approach to AI in education at Microsoft headquarters.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The Generator Releases its First Survey of Babson Undergraduate AI-Usage
news.summary: The first survey of Babson undergraduate AI usage — how students actually use AI in classes and ventures.
news.author: babson.edu

news.title: The Generator, an Interdisciplinary AI Lab, Launches at Babson College
news.summary: The founding announcement: The Generator launches as Babson's interdisciplinary AI lab, uniting faculty across disciplines with students and industry partners.
news.author: babson.edu
